item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly refuses the requested entrance-page note, identifies the repeated pattern of queue/documents/ticketing/rescheduling being patched across separate downstream touchpoints, reframes the issue as missing upstream ownership of patient-facing uncertainty, and proposes responsibility consolidation before any page change. It does not provide the requested patch copy, field, placement, checklist, or implementation step."}
